text: A person shall not display a flashing or steady burning red or blue warning light on an off-highway motor vehicle except as permitted by Section 21055 or when an extreme hazard exists.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 6. Equipment of Off-Highway Vehicles [38325 - 38397]
#### Article 2. Lighting Equipment [38335 - 38346]
##### § 38346

A person shall not display a flashing or steady burning red or blue warning light on an off-highway motor vehicle except as permitted by Section 21055 or when an extreme hazard exists.

*(Added by Stats. 2004, Ch. 908, Sec. 24. Effective January 1, 2005.)*

subsections.text: A person shall not display a flashing or steady burning red or blue warning light on an off-highway motor vehicle except as permitted by Section 21055 or when an extreme hazard exists.
